user.title: Add a UniFi AP BLE proxy
user.description:
1) In UniFi, go to Settings → System → Device SSH Authentication, enable it, and add this public key (covers the APs and the gateway):

```
{public_key}
```

2) Enter the AP's address. If Home Assistant cannot reach the AP directly, set the jump host to your UDM/gateway; the same key is used for both.

error.cannot_connect: Could not tunnel in and reach bleconnd. Check SSH access, the key provisioning, and the jump host.
error.no_adapter: Connected, but the AP reported no BLE interface.
